title: Wither's Mecha Mod
description: A mod developped in 24 hours for a challenge to add a mecha in the game.
body:
A mod made for a challenge, has been developped in 24 hours.

Currently no plan to develop it further, but may be updated later in time. 



Tested with NeoForged 1.20.1


The mod adds a Mecha to the game, which is more or less a really fast horse who can't jump.
